source_pr.title: *: don't import golang.org/x/net/context as goctx alias
source_pr.body:
Now that there is no conflict with sessionctx.Context, this package can be
import directly

symptoms: // The test suite takes too long under the race detector. | rss, err := tk.Se.Execute(ctx, "select * from earlyclose order by id") (executor/executor_test.go)
failure_signature: // The test suite takes too long under the race detector. | rss, err := tk.Se.Execute(ctx, "select * from earlyclose order by id") (executor/executor_test.go)
root_cause_explanation: The test was flaky because it relied on nondeterministic result ordering (e.g., missing ORDER BY / unsorted assertions). Result ordering is not guaranteed unless explicitly enforced. This PR stabilizes it by: Sort results / enforce deterministic ordering before assertions to avoid nondeterministic flakiness.
fix_pattern: Sort results / enforce deterministic ordering before assertions to avoid nondeterministic flakiness.

evidence: evidence: // The test suite takes too long under the race detector. | rss, err := tk.Se.Execute(ctx, "select * from earlyclose order by id") (executor/executor_test.go)
